name: Portuguese Pork with Lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from pork.
2. Cut pork into 3/4-inch cubes.
3. Toss the cubed pork together with garlic, lemon juice, 1 tablespoon oil, salt, cumin, and red pepper in a glass or plastic bowl.
4. Cover and refrigerate, stirring occasionally, for at least 8 hours.
5. Remove pork from the marinade. Reserve any remaining marinade.
6. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet until hot.
7. Cook and stir the pork in the oil over medium heat until the liquid has evaporated and the pork is brown, about 25 minutes.
8. Drain excess oil from the pork.
9. Add water and reserved marinade to the pan.
10. Cover and simmer until the pork is tender, about 30 minutes. Add water if necessary.
11. Stir in the pitted ripe olives before serving.
